api_key.description: SmartReach API key, sent as the X-API-KEY header. Never logged.

base_url.description: SmartReach API base URL override for tests or proxies.

team_id.description: Optional team_id query filter, applied to campaigns/prospects/email_settings/do_not_contact streams (not teams). Legacy also accepts an alias config key `teamid`; this dialect can express only one config key per query param, so `teamid` is not modeled here (see docs.md Known limits) — use `team_id` directly.

older_than.description: Optional older_than query filter passed through verbatim.

newer_than.description: Optional newer_than query filter passed through verbatim.
